title: 10 best herbal capsules for oily face

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Germander capsules helps with oily face because they possess a natural ability to balance sebum production, reducing excessive oil secretion. The capsules' active compounds work to regulate the skin's natural moisture levels, preventing clogged pores and acne breakouts associated with oily skin. Additionally, germander has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm irritated skin, leaving it looking healthier and more even-toned. With regular use, herbal germander capsules can effectively reduce facial oiliness, promoting a smoother and clearer complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Germander capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress on the skin, which can contribute to oiliness.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in germander capsules can help reduce redness, swelling, and acne caused by excess oil production, promoting a clearer and more balanced complexion.
Astringent properties: Germander has natural astringent properties that can help tighten pores and reduce sebum production, resulting in a less oily appearance and improved skin texture.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making it effective in reducing acne and soothing redness on oily skin.
Barks: High in tannins, which help to reduce oil production, tighten pores, and normalize skin tone.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried leaves of germander plant and grind them into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar pestle.
Measure out one part of the powdered germander and mix it with two parts of organic coconut oil in a small bowl.
Add a few drops of vitamin e oil to the mixture and stir well for about 5 minutes until a smooth paste forms.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with the herbal paste, making sure each capsule contains approximately 250-500 mg of germander extract.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months or longer if refrigerated.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tea tree capsules helps with oily face because they contain the potent antibacterial properties of tea tree oil, which effectively combat acne-causing bacteria. The capsules also help to reduce sebum production, balancing the skin's natural oils and controlling oiliness. Additionally, tea tree's anti-inflammatory properties soothe redness and irritation, leaving the skin looking clearer and more radiant. By reducing inflammation and killing bacteria, tea tree capsules provide a natural and effective solution for managing oily skin.
remedy_properties: Tea Tree Oil (Melaleuca Alternifolia): Known for its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which help to combat acne-causing bacteria and reduce inflammation on the skin, leading to a more balanced complexion.
L-Cysteine: An amino acid that helps to break down sebum, reducing oil production and unclog pores, resulting in a clearer and less oily face.

Hyaluronic Acid (HA): A natural humectant that attracts and retains moisture in the skin, helping to balance oil production and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, while also soothing and calming the skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help reduce acne and soothe irritated skin.
Buds: Contains high amounts of cineole, a natural oil that helps regulate sebum production and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Dry 10 grams of fresh melaleuca alternifolia leaves in a single layer at room temperature for 7 days.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix 5 grams of the powdered herb with 50 milliliters of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil for 10 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to maintain potency for 1 week.
Store the herbal tea tree capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with oily face because they contain powerful anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce sebum production, soothing and calming the skin. The aloe vera gel inside the capsules penetrates deep into the pores, gently cleansing and purifying them, while also regulating the oil glands' function. This natural approach helps to balance the skin's natural pH, reducing excess oil secretion and leaving the face feeling refreshed, purified, and healthy-looking.
remedy_properties: Aloe Vera's Antioxidant Properties: Help to neutralize free radicals that can cause skin inflammation, which can contribute to oiliness and acne.
Aloe's Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with acne, which can lead to a decrease in sebum production and a more balanced skin pH.

Aloe's Hydrating and Soothing Properties: Moisturize the skin without clogging pores, helping to regulate oil production and reduce the appearance of pores, resulting in a clearer and healthier-looking complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Known for their ability to absorb excess oil and purify the skin, making them effective in reducing acne and hyperpigmentation.
Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of aloe vera gel from the leaves of mature plants grown in organic soil.
Wash the harvested gel with distilled water and sterilize it using a membrane filtration system.
Blend the sterilized gel with 200 milliliters of glycerin and 100 milliliters of filtered water for 30 minutes.
Fill 500-milligram hard shell capsules with the blended mixture, ensuring precise dosing and uniformity.
Store the filled capsules in a cool, dry place for up to six months, monitoring their appearance and texture regularly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass capsules helps with oily face because of its natural antifungal and antibacterial properties. The capsule's active ingredients work to reduce sebum production, unclog pores, and eliminate acne-causing bacteria, leading to a more balanced skin tone and reduced oiliness. Additionally, lemongrass has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. As a result, users may experience improved complexion, reduced pores, and a more even-toned face.
remedy_properties: Citral content: Lemongrass capsules contain citral, a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent that helps to reduce acne-causing bacteria on the skin, thereby minimizing oil production and reducing acne.
Astringent properties: Lemongrass has astringent properties that help to tighten pores and reduce sebum secretion, leaving the skin looking smoother and less oily.
Anti-inflammatory effects: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemongrass capsules can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with acne and oily skin.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Lemongrass rhyzomes have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce redness and swelling associated with oily skin, making them an effective ingredient in medicinal capsules.
Roots: The roots of lemongrass contain antioxidants that combat free radicals and soothe acne-prone skin, helping to regulate oil production and clear up blemishes.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry high-quality cymbopogon citratus leaves to ensure maximum potency.
Grind 20 grams of dried lemongrass leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered lemongrass with 40 grams of silica gel in a large bowl to prevent clumping.
Fill 100 empty capsules with a uniform amount of the lemongrass-silica mixture weighing approximately 200 milligrams per capsule.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for at least two weeks before use allowing flavors and aromas to mature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with oily face because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. When taken orally, it can help to reduce sebum production in the skin, which in turn helps to control oiliness and reduce acne. Additionally, licorice root has antiseptic properties that help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin conditions. By addressing the root cause of oiliness from within, herbal licorice capsules can lead to a clearer and more balanced complexion.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to reduce acne and prevent bacterial growth on the skin, resulting in a clearer complexion.
Licoric acid: Acts as a natural antiseptic and astringent, helping to dry up excess oil and reduce pores, leading to a more balanced skin tone and reduced sebum production.
Flavonoids: Have antioxidant properties that help to neutralize free radicals and soothe the skin, reducing redness and irritation caused by clogged pores and excess oil.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing acne and soothing oily skin.
Barks: Licorice barks contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce sebum production and calm inflammation, making them useful in treating oily face issues.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots, 250mg per capsule.
Grind 2500mg of dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 500mg of silica or calcium carbonate as filler.
Fill #00 empty gelatin capsules with a mixture of 250mg powdered root and 100mg silica.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to two years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sesame capsules helps with oily face because they contain natural antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that help to regulate sebum production. The capsules also contain sesamin, a compound that has been shown to inhibit 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT), which can contribute to excessive oil production. By balancing hormonal fluctuations and reducing inflammation, sesame capsules can help to normalize skin's natural oil balance, leaving the face looking clearer and more balanced.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant property: Herbal sesame capsules contain antioxidants like vitamin E, which helps to neutralize free radicals that can contribute to skin inflammation and oil production, reducing the appearance of an oily complexion.

Anti-inflammatory property: Sesame seeds have anti-inflammatory compounds like sesamolin and sesaminol, which help to reduce inflammation in the skin, thereby decreasing the production of sebum and reducing the appearance of pores, making skin look less oily.

Antibacterial property: The antibacterial properties of sesame seeds can help to control the growth of bacteria on the skin that can contribute to clogged pores and excess oil production, resulting in a more balanced and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sesamin, a natural antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation and regulate sebum production.
Barks: Contain sesaminol, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing redness and irritation on oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest sesamum indicum seeds in late summer or early fall when they are mature and dry.
Clean the harvested sesame seeds by removing any debris or impurities manually.
Grind the clean sesame seeds into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the ground sesame powder with distilled water in a ratio of 1:5 to form a paste within 30 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with the sesame paste mixture and seal them immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with oily face because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The active compound curcumin in turmeric capsules reduces sebum production, which can clog pores and lead to acne. It also soothes and calms the skin, reducing redness and irritation associated with oily skin. Additionally, turmeric's antioxidant properties help protect the skin from environmental stressors that can exacerbate oiliness, resulting in a more balanced and healthy complexion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Turmeric's anti-inflammatory property helps reduce redness and inflammation associated with acne-prone skin, which can exacerbate oiliness.
Antioxidant: Turmeric's antioxidant property neutralizes free radicals that can damage the skin and lead to increased oil production, thus reducing sebum levels.
Wound-healing: Turmeric's wound-healing properties help promote collagen synthesis and improve skin elasticity, which can help reduce the appearance of pores and minimize oiliness.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in curcumin, a potent antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation and sebum production, making it effective in controlling acne and other skin issues associated with oily faces.
Roots: Containing a high concentration of volatile oils, which help to balance the skin's natural pH, reducing oiliness and preventing clogged pores.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh turmeric roots curcuma longa from your garden or local market for best quality.
Dry the turmeric roots in a well-ventilated area at room temperature for 7 to 10 days.
Grind dried turmeric into fine powder using mortar and pestle for optimal extraction.
Mix turmeric powder with glycerin and distilled water to form a paste ratio 1:2:0.5 within 15 minutes.
Fill the prepared mixture into empty gelatin capsules size 00 or 0 and store in airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Anise capsules helps with oily face because they contain natural compounds that help regulate oil production in the skin. The capsule's active ingredients, such as anethole and apiol, work to reduce sebum secretion, leaving the skin looking balanced and refreshed. Additionally, anise has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and pores appear smaller. As a result, using herbal anise capsules can lead to a healthier, more radiant complexion that's less prone to oiliness.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial Properties: Anise capsules have antibacterial properties that help control the growth of bacteria on the skin, reducing acne and inflammation caused by excess oil production.
Astringent Properties: The astringent compounds in anise capsules help to tighten pores and reduce sebum secretion, leaving the skin feeling cleaner and more refined.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: Anise capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Anise roots are known for their anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce redness and swelling associated with oily skin.
Seeds: Anise seeds have antioxidant properties that can help soothe and calm acne-prone skin, reducing the appearance of pores.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 200 grams of dried pimpinella anisum herb into a clean glass container.
Combine the herb with 400 milliliters of boiling water and let it steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into another container.
Mix the resulting liquid with 500 grams of glycerin and 250 grams of distilled water in a ratio of 1:2.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 400 milligrams of the anise herbal extract mixture.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tasmanian blue gum capsules helps with oily face because they contain Eucalyptus globulus, a natural antiseptic that reduces sebum production. The capsules also have anti-inflammatory properties that calm and soothe the skin, reducing redness and acne. Additionally, Tasmanian blue gum has natural astringent properties that help to tighten pores, minimizing their appearance and reducing the appearance of oiliness. This results in a clearer, more balanced complexion with reduced shine and a healthier-looking glow.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Tasmanian Blue Gum contains antioxidants that can help neutralize free radicals and reduce inflammation in the skin, which may lead to a reduction in oil production and improved skin clarity.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsules contain compounds like eucalyptol and globulol, which have anti-inflammatory effects that may help reduce redness and swelling associated with acne-prone skin, including oily faces.

Antibacterial properties: Tasmanian Blue Gum has been shown to exhibit antibacterial activity against Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes), a bacteria that can contribute to clogged pores and oily skin, which may help reduce the appearance of blemishes and improve skin texture.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, Tasmanian Blue Gum roots help reduce inflammation and prevent acne caused by excessive oil production.

Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, the barks of the Tasmanian Blue Gum plant have been traditionally used to treat skin issues like oily skin, reducing sebum production and purifying pores.
remedy_recipe: Measure dried eucalyptus globulus leaves according to the formula of 20:1 or 30:1 herb-to-carrier ratio.
Grind the measured eucalyptus globulus leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Mix the ground eucalyptus globulus powder with 100% pure beeswax and coconut oil in a 1:5 ratio by weight.
Prepare softgel capsules by filling them with the eucalyptus globulus and beeswax mixture and sealing the ends securely.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years or freeze for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon capsules helps with oily face because they contain natural astringent and antibacterial properties that help to reduce excess oil production. The antioxidants present in these capsules also help to purify the skin by removing dirt and impurities, unclog pores, and balance the skin's natural pH level. Additionally, lemon capsules can help to tighten pores, reducing their appearance and giving the skin a smoother, clearer complexion.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial and antifungal properties: These properties help to combat acne-causing bacteria and fungi on the skin, reducing inflammation and preventing clogged pores.
Astringent properties: The astringent properties of lemon herbs help to constrict pores, reducing oil secretion and refining skin texture, leaving it looking smoother and more even-toned.
Antioxidant properties: Lemon's high antioxidant content helps to neutralize free radicals that can damage the skin, reduce inflammation, and improve overall skin health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, lemon roots help reduce inflammation and purify the skin, making them effective in managing oily skin.
Rhyzomes: Containing natural antibacterial properties, rhyzomes aid in fighting acne-causing bacteria and reducing excessive oil production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh lemons and peel them using a vegetable peeler to obtain approximately 100g of lemon zest.
Combine the lemon zest with 250g of dried herbaceous plants such as chamomile or calendula in a clean glass jar.
Pour 500ml of carrier oil like sweet almond or jojoba oil over the plant mixture and seal the jar for 4 weeks for infusing.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth into another clean glass jar leaving behind the solids and discarding them immediately.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal lemon oil and store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for oily face are natural supplements that help to regulate oil production, reduce acne, and soothe irritated skin. These capsules contain a blend of herbs that work synergistically to balance the skin's natural pH and prevent excessive oil production. The best herbal capsules for oily face include Aloe vera, Silybum marianum, Melaleuca alternifolia, Ginkgo biloba, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Curcuma longa, Aloe barbadensis, Camellia sinensis, Terminalia chebula, and Rosmarinus officinalis. If left untreated, oily face can lead to low self-esteem, social withdrawal, and even depression due to constant feelings of embarrassment and self-consciousness.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat oily face with herbal capsules is by choosing formulations that specifically target oil production. Look for ingredients like Triphala, Neem, and Tea Tree Oil, which have natural astringent and antibacterial properties that help reduce sebum secretion and unclog pores. Take the recommended dose twice daily with water and maintain a consistent skincare routine to achieve desired results.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to oily face that are treated with herbal capsules are acne, rosacea, and hyper-pigmentation. These conditions often share common symptoms such as excess oil production, clogged pores, and skin inflammation. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like turmeric, neem, and tea tree extract can help to regulate sebum production, reduce inflammation, and prevent bacterial growth, resulting in clearer and healthier-looking skin.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe vera capsules helps with oily face because they contain aloe's anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help regulate sebum production and balance the skin's natural pH. The vitamins and minerals present in aloe vera capsules, such as vitamin E and beta-carotene, also help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and redness associated with oily skin. Regular consumption of aloe vera capsules can lead to a more balanced and healthy skin tone, reducing the appearance of oily pores.
remedy_constituents: Aloe-emodin: It has anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which help to reduce sebum production and tighten pores, thereby controlling oiliness on the face.
Cinnamic acid: It has astringent and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce sebum production, prevent bacterial growth, and minimize oiliness on the face.
Isobarbaloin: It has astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce sebum production, soothe skin irritation, and regulate oil balance on the face.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Aloe vera gel from the leaves is used to help regulate oil production and reduce acne due to its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.
Leaves (Gel): The clear gel inside the leaves helps to unclog pores and reduce oiliness, making it a popular choice for oily face capsules.
Leaves (Aloe Vera Extract): Aloe vera extract from the leaves is used to control sebum production and minimize the appearance of pores, addressing oily face concerns.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10-15 aloe vera leaves with thick green rinds and cut them into small pieces.
Extract the gel from the aloe vera pieces using a blender or food processor for 5 minutes.
Mix 1 tablespoon of the aloe vera gel with 1 tablespoon of glycerin in a bowl.
Fill gelatin capsules with the aloe vera mixture using a capsule filling machine for 2 minutes.
Store the herbal aloe vera capsules in an airtight container in a cool dry place forever.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum capsules helps with oily face because they contain milk thistle extract, which is rich in silymarin, a potent antioxidant. Silymarin has been shown to reduce inflammation and prevent damage to skin cells, resulting in a balanced skin tone and reduced sebum production. By regulating the skin's natural oil production, Silybum marianum capsules can help to control oily skin and prevent clogged pores, promoting a healthier and more radiant complexion. Regular use can lead to a smoother and more even-toned skin.
remedy_constituents: Silymarin: Silymarin reduces inflammation and oxidative stress, which contribute to oil production and clogged pores on the skin, thereby helping to control oily face.
Flavonoids (especially quercetin and kaempferol): Flavonoids exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to regulate sebum production, reducing the appearance of oily skin.

Lignans (especially isoorientin and isovitexin): Lignans have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and reduce oil production.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Silybum marianum seeds are used to make capsules for oily face because they are rich in silymarin, an antioxidant that helps to regulate oil production and reduce inflammation.
Leaves: Silybum marianum leaves are used to make capsules for oily face because they have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help to reduce acne and control oil secretion.
Flowers: Silybum marianum flowers are used to make capsules for oily face because they have astringent and antiseptic properties that help to dry out the skin and reduce oil production.
remedy_recipe: Dry 100 grams of silybum marianum flowers in a low-temperature oven at 40°c for 24 hours.
Grind 50 grams of dried silybum marianum flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix 1 gram of powdered silybum marianum with 5 grams of cellulose powder in a clean container.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the powdered silybum marianum mixture each.
Label and store the silybum marianum capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Melaleuca alternifolia capsules helps with oily face because of its natural astringent and antimicrobial properties. Tea tree oil, extracted from the plant, has been shown to reduce sebum production and inflammation, common causes of oily skin. By regulating the skin's natural oil balance, Melaleuca alternifolia capsules can help to control shine and prevent clogged pores. Regular use may also improve skin tone and reduce acne, leaving the skin looking clearer and more balanced. This natural remedy offers a gentle, non-irritating solution for managing oily skin.
remedy_constituents: Cineole: Helps to reduce oil production in the skin by inhibiting the activity of sebaceous glands.
Linalool: Acts as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, reducing the occurrence of acne and other skin conditions that can be triggered by oily skin.
Eugenol: Possesses antimicrobial properties that help to control the growth of bacteria on the skin, which can contribute to oiliness and acne.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Known for their high content of essential oils, particularly tea tree oil, which is commonly used in skincare products for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.
Stems: Contain a significant amount of melaleuca oil, which is used in skincare products to help control oil production and reduce acne.
Barks: Also a source of melaleuca oil, which is used in skincare products to help balance the skin's pH and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried melaleuca alternifolia leaves by selecting fresh material and drying it properly at 50 degrees celsius for 2 hours.
Grind 30g of the dried leaves into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder at 10000 rpm for 10 seconds.
Mix 10g of the ground powder with 5g of a natural binding agent and 2g of a filler agent in a stainless steel bowl.
Fill 50 empty vegetarian capsules with the prepared mixture using a capsule filler machine at a rate of 2 capsules per minute.
Label and store the filled capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba capsules helps with oily face because of its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The flavonoids present in Ginkgo biloba help to regulate and balance the skin's oil production, reducing excessive sebum secretion and thus reducing the appearance of oily skin. Additionally, Ginkgo biloba's ability to improve blood circulation and reduce oxidative stress also contributes to a clearer and more balanced complexion, making it a popular natural remedy for individuals struggling with oily skin. This natural approach promotes a healthy-looking skin.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: They help to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation, which can help to balance sebum production and reduce the appearance of oily skin.

Bilobalide: This constituent has antioxidant properties that can help to prevent damage to skin cells, reduce inflammation, and improve skin elasticity, all of which can contribute to a healthier and less oily complexion.

Ginkgolides: They have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to reduce inflammation, prevent skin cell damage, and improve skin hydration, all of which can help to reduce the appearance of oily skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Ginkgo biloba leaves are commonly used due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce sebum production and prevent acne.
Seeds: Ginkgo biloba seeds are also used to produce capsules for oily face due to their ability to regulate oil secretion and improve skin clarity.
Barks: Some products may use Ginkgo biloba barks, which are said to possess anti-septic and anti-inflammatory properties, to help reduce inflammation and soothe oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Grind 1:200 ratio of dried ginkgo biloba leaves to a fine powder in a food processor.
Mix 250mg of the powdered ginkgo biloba with 250mg of cellulose in a bowl.
Add 10-15 drops of glycerin to the mixture and stir until well combined.
Fill a capsule machine with the mixture and operate it according to manufacturer's instructions.
Label and store the herbal ginkgo biloba capsules in an airtight container at room temperature.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra capsules helps with oily face because of its ability to regulate the body's natural hormone balance, particularly cortisol levels, which play a significant role in sebum production. The anti-inflammatory properties of licorice root in these capsules help to reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin. Additionally, the antioxidant properties help to protect the skin from oxidative stress, promoting a healthier and more balanced complexion, thereby reducing the appearance of oily skin.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Help reduce oil production in the skin by inhibiting the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that promotes oil production.
Glycyrrhizin: Exert anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and redness associated with oily skin.
Flavonoids: Possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and inflammation, which can contribute to oily skin and acne.
remedy_parts: Roots: Glycyrrhiza glabra roots are the most commonly used part for making capsules to combat oily faces because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to reduce sebum production and inflammation.

Leaves: The leaves of Glycyrrhiza glabra are used to make capsules for oily faces because they contain various flavonoids and saponins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and balance the skin.

Barks: The barks of Glycyrrhiza glabra are used to make capsules for oily faces because they contain glycosides and flavonoids that have astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce excess oil and tighten the skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots from a reputable supplier.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix 10 grams of the powdered glycyrrhiza glabra with 10 grams of starch and 10 grams of gelatin.
Use a capsule machine to fill 100 vegetable capsules with the powder mixture.
Label and seal the capsules and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for 6 months.

remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa capsules helps with oily face because they contain turmeric, a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant that reduces sebum production and inflammation in the skin. The active compound curcumin in Curcuma longa capsules has been shown to inhibit the production of androgen hormones, which stimulate oil glands, thereby reducing excessive oil secretion and acne. Additionally, curcumin's potent antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage skin cells, promoting a healthier and more balanced skin tone. This results in a clearer and more radiant complexion.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: It has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the skin, which can lead to an imbalance in oil production and contribute to an oily face.

Demethoxycurcumin: It has been shown to have anti-acne and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the severity of oily skin and acne by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and other mediators.

Beta-Caryophyllene: It has anti-inflammatory and sebum-regulating properties that can help to reduce the production of sebum, which can contribute to an oily face, and also has antimicrobial properties that can help to prevent the growth of bacteria that can lead to acne.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: They are used due to their high curcumin content, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to control and balance the skin's natural oil production.
Leaves: They are used as they contain flavonoids and tannins that have astringent properties, which help to tighten the skin and reduce oil production.
Stems: They are used as they contain a compound that helps to regulate the skin's natural oil production, reducing oiliness and controlling acne.
remedy_recipe: Grind 10g of dried turmeric roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the ground powder with 50g of gelatin in a bowl and stir until well combined.
Add 10g of glycerin to the gelatin mixture and stir until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
Use a dropper to fill empty capsules with the gelatin mixture and seal each capsule tightly.
Label and store the herbal curcuma longa capsules in a cool dry place for up to 2 years.

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis capsules helps with oily face because they are rich in antioxidants and vitamins A, C, and E. These nutrients help to balance the skin's natural pH, reducing the production of excess oil. Aloe vera also has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation associated with oily skin. By regulating the skin's natural oil production and reducing inflammation, aloe vera capsules can help to achieve a balanced and healthy complexion.
remedy_constituents: Aloin: Helps by reducing sebum production and promoting skin clarity, thereby minimizing oiliness.
Apolypodins (Polysaccharides): Helps by absorbing excess oil and moisture from the skin, reducing the appearance of oily skin.

Bradykininase Inhibitors (Pectin-like Polysaccharides): Helps by inhibiting the enzyme bradykininase, which breaks down bradykinin, a peptide that promotes oil production and inflammation in the skin.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in aloe vera gel, which helps to balance the skin's pH and reduce oil production.
Leaves: Contains aloin, a compound that helps to reduce inflammation and prevent clogged pores.
Leaves: Rich in vitamins A, C, and E, which help to nourish and protect the skin, reducing the appearance of oily pores.
remedy_recipe: Extract 100g of aloe barbadensis gel from fresh aloe leaves allow to cool for 30 minutes.
Mix 10g of the cooled aloe barbadensis gel with 20g of distilled water and 1g of glycerin.
Use a hand blender to mix the aloe barbadensis gel mixture for 5 minutes.
Filter the mixture through a coffee filter into a clean container using a 10 micron filter.
Fill 100 herbal capsules with the filtered aloe barbadensis gel mixture using a capsule filler.

remedies.remedy_desc: Camellia sinensis capsules helps with oily face because they contain antioxidants and other beneficial compounds that help to balance the skin's natural oil production. The herbal properties of Camellia sinensis, also known as green tea, work to reduce inflammation and prevent clogged pores, resulting in a clearer and more even-toned complexion. Additionally, the astringent properties of Camellia sinensis help to tighten pores, giving the skin a smoother appearance and reducing the appearance of oily skin. This leads to a more balanced and radiant skin tone.
remedy_constituents: Catechins: Help reduce the production of sebum, an oily substance produced by the skin, thereby reducing the appearance of oily skin.
Quinic acids: Inhibit the growth of Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes), a type of bacteria that can contribute to oily skin and acne.
Theaflavins: Have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin, while also regulating the skin's natural balance of oils.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used in tea or as an extract due to their astringent and antiseptic properties, which help to balance skin pH and reduce oil production.
Seeds: Rich in antioxidants and essential fatty acids, they are often used in skincare products to regulate sebum production and soothe oily skin.
Barks: Containing compounds like theaflavin, they help to regulate sebum production, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant benefits to oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of camellia sinensis leaves at peak freshness when the buds are still closed tightly.
Dry the harvested leaves in a single layer at 50c for 2 hours to prevent fermentation.
Crush the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle to increase surface area.
Mix 1g of the powdered camellia sinensis with 1g of gelatin and 1ml of distilled water to form a paste.
Fill a capsule with the prepared paste and seal immediately to prevent degradation and contamination.

remedies.remedy_desc: Terminalia chebula capsules helps with oily face because they possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to balance the skin's natural pH and reduce sebum production. The herb is rich in chebulic acid, which has been shown to have a positive effect on skin health by reducing the appearance of pores and controlling oil secretion. Regular use of Terminalia chebula capsules can lead to a healthier, more balanced complexion, reducing the appearance of oily skin and promoting a radiant glow.
remedy_constituents: Chebulic acid: Helps reduce sebum production and inflammation in the skin, thereby controlling oily face.
Ellagic acid: Exhibits antioxidant properties that help reduce inflammation and prevent acne, which in turn helps control oily face.
Tannins: Acts as astringents, reducing sebum production and tightening pores to minimize oily appearance on the face.
remedy_parts: Fruits: The fruits of Terminalia chebula are used to make capsules for oily face due to their astringent and antiseptic properties.
Barks: The barks of Terminalia chebula are used to make capsules for oily face due to their astringent and anti-inflammatory properties.
Seeds: The seeds of Terminalia chebula are used to make capsules for oily face due to their astringent and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Sift 250 grams of terminalia chebula powder through a fine mesh to remove any lumps or impurities.
Mix 250 grams of the sifted powder with 125 grams of starch in a large bowl.
Add 25 grams of vegetable glycerin and 10 grams of silicon dioxide to the mixture in the bowl.
Fill a capsule machine with the herbal powder mixture and set the capsule size to 0 size.
Fill approximately 100 capsules with the herbal powder mixture and store them in an airtight container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Rosmarinus officinalis capsules helps with oily face because they contain rosmarinic acid, a potent antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation and regulate sebum production. This natural anti-inflammatory agent also helps to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of pores and minimizing oil production. By promoting a healthy balance of sebum and reducing inflammation, Rosmarinus officinalis capsules can lead to a clearer, more balanced complexion, reducing the visibility of oily skin and acne. It also helps to improve skin's overall tone and texture.
remedy_constituents: Carnosic acid: Helps reduce oil production by inhibiting the activity of enzymes responsible for sebum production in the skin.
Rosmarinic acid: Exhibits anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin, promoting a healthier skin balance.
Bornyl acetate: Possesses antibacterial properties, helping to prevent the growth of bacteria that can clog pores and contribute to oily skin, reducing the risk of acne breakouts.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce acne and soothe irritated skin.
Flowers: They are used for their astringent and antiseptic properties that help to control oil production and prevent breakouts.
Stems: They are used due to their antioxidant properties that help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Dry the rosmarinus officinalis leaves by spreading them on paper towels for 2-3 days in a dry environment.
Crush the dried rosmarinus officinalis leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 5 minutes.
Mix the powder with a binding agent like gelatin or silica in a ratio of 1:1 for 2 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filler machine for 10 minutes.
Label and date the capsules and store them in a cool dark place for 6 months.
